---
title: "cumulative_records"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

source(here::here("scripts", "load_functions.R"))
triggerR <- load_trigger_functions()
```

```{r}
accounts <- if (!exists("accounts")) {
  triggerR$active_accounts()
} else accounts

trigger_daily <- if (!exists("trigger_daily")) {
  triggerR$read_trigger_tables(granularity = "daily", cores = 5)
} else trigger_daily
```

```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}
df_cum <- trigger_daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(userId), source != "sleep") %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"),
         date <= Sys.Date()) %>%
  group_by(source, date) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(n_records_total), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(source, date) %>%
  group_by(source) %>%
  mutate(cum_n = cumsum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

# totale
df_tot <- df_cum %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(cum_n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  mutate(cum_n = cumsum(cum_n),
         source = "TOTAL")

p_source <- bind_rows(df_cum, df_tot) %>%
  ggplot(aes(date, cum_n, color = source)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Cumulative records",
    color = "Source") +
  scale_color_discrete(guide = guide_legend(nrow = 2)) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

p_source
```


```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}
df_cum <- trigger_daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(userId), source != "sleep") %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"),
         date <= Sys.Date()) %>%
  left_join(accounts, by = "userId") %>%
  group_by(country, date) %>%
  summarise(n = sum(n_records_total), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(country, date) %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  mutate(cum_n = cumsum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

# totale
df_tot <- df_cum %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(cum_n = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(date) %>%
  mutate(cum_n = cumsum(cum_n),
         country = "TOTAL")

p_country <- bind_rows(df_cum, df_tot) %>%
  ggplot(aes(date, cum_n, color = country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Cumulative records",
    color = "Source") +
  scale_color_discrete(guide = guide_legend(nrow = 2)) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

p_country
```

```{r}
ggsave(here::here("outputs", "HF_cumulative_records_by_source.png"),
       plot = p_source, width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)

ggsave(here::here("outputs", "HF_cumulative_records_by_country.png"),
       plot = p_country, width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

## Cumulative Users

```{r, fig.width=5, fig.height=5}
p_users <- trigger_daily %>%
  filter(!is.na(userId), source != "sleep") %>%
  filter(date >= as.Date("2025-03-01"),
         date <= Sys.Date()) %>%
  group_by(userId) %>%
  summarise(first_date = min(date), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(first_date) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(first_date) %>%
  mutate(cum_users = cumsum(n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(first_date, cum_users)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Cumulative users",
       title = "Cumulative number of users over time")
p_users
```

```{r}
ggsave(here::here("outputs", "HF_cumulative_users.png"), width = 5, height = 5, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
rm(df_cum, df_tot, p_country, p_source, p_users)
```
